section.intent: Final brand touchpoint and social links.
section.contentHints: Social icons (bat-shaped), contact email, copyright, and 'Enter if you dare' newsletter sign-up.

designPlan.role: Final brand touchpoint and secondary conversion
designPlan.goal: Capture remaining interest and provide social proof/contact
designPlan.roleFit: Serves the Visitor who has scrolled to the end without converting yet
designPlan.taskLoopFocus: Secondary entry point for the lead capture loop via newsletter
designPlan.capabilityFocus: Reinforce thematic immersion with playful horror elements
designPlan.informationArchitecture: Newsletter signup, social links, and legal/contact info
designPlan.layoutIntent: Multi-column footer with a dark, textured background
designPlan.visualIntent: Mysterious and nocturnal with slime green accents for the signup button
designPlan.interactionIntent: Simple form validation for the newsletter
designPlan.contentStrategy: Use playful horror copy like 'Enter if you dare' to maintain engagement
constraints: Social icons must have clear alt text
designPlan.rationale: The footer acts as a safety net for conversion while closing the thematic narrative.
